name: Prova
description: The Prova is a Melee Weapon that delivers a high-intensity shock to its target.

components.name: Alloy Plate
components.description:
Carbon steel plates used to reinforce Grineer armor.

Location: Venus, Phobos, Ceres, Jupiter, Pluto, and Sedna.

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: The Prova is a Melee Weapon that delivers a high-intensity shock to its target.

components.name: Fieldron
components.description:
ClanTech weaponized containment field to contain superheated substances.

Location: Clan Research (Energy Lab in the Dojo) and Corpus Invasion Rewards

components.name: Forma
components.description: This shape-altering component is fundamental to Orokin construction. Allows you to change the polarity of a mod slot on a Warframe, Companions or Weapon and then resets their affinity to Unranked. This can only be used on max Rank Warframes, Companions and Weapons.

components.name: Salvage
components.description:
High value metals collected from war salvage.

Location: Mars, Jupiter, and Sedna

patchlogs.name: Echoes of the Zariman: Update 31.6
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed case of Ved Xol getting stuck while trying to melee with his Prova in the Index.

patchlogs.name: The Old Blood: Hotfix 26.0.3
patchlogs.changes: Fixed Prova series, Kreska, Sheev, Machete series, Mire, Scoliac, Kama, Nami Solo, Plasma Sword and Destreza series not consuming Combo Counter on Heavy Attack.

patchlogs.name: Oberon Prime: Update 20.7.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed disarming Corpus Power Carriers resulting in their Provas floating outside of their hands.

patchlogs.name: The Glast Gambit: Update 19.7.0
patchlogs.changes: Prova is now eligible for Conclave.

patchlogs.name: Update 19: The War Within
patchlogs.changes: Reduced the damage of the Static Discharge Mod due to the Prova dealing (at least) 5 ticks of damage during the charge attack.

patchlogs.name: Update 18.13.0: TennoGen, Passives, & Reworks
patchlogs.changes: •    Grineer enemies that become disarmed will now use a Sheev to seek revenge on you, and Corpus will use the Prova.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.8.1
patchlogs.changes: •    The Quanta Vandal and Prova Vandal are now tradable!

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 13.8.1
patchlogs.fixes: Added channelling effects to the Prova Vandal.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 11.0.6
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed missing charge animations in Prova attacks.

patchlogs.name: Update 11: Valkyr Unleashed
patchlogs.changes: Switched the Prova to use Machete animations and finishers

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 8.3
patchlogs.changes: EDIT @ 8:24 PM Prova Weapon model updated.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 8.2: Tenno Reinforcement
patchlogs.changes: Updated Prova model   waiting on further positive reports beyond an updated icon. Results of reports: icon has been updated, rest remains to be added.
